title: Martin Borriss
text: Home * People * Martin Borriss Martin Borriss [1] Martin Borriss , a German chess international master [2] and computer scientist with expertise in real-time operating systems , Linux kernel , network programming , system programming , and high-speed communication [3] . He holds a diploma degree and Ph.D. both from TU Dresden in 1994 and 1998 respectively. As computer chess programmer, Martin Borriss is author of the free open source engine Gullydeckel , which supports the Chess Engine Communication Protocol [4] .
